# HitPaw Video API Reference

Public page: https://developer.hitpaw.com/video/API-reference

## Base URL
https://api-base.hitpaw.com

## Authentication
All API requests require authentication.

- Don't have an API key? Get started by purchasing and managing keys on the HitPaw API Platform:
  https://platform.hitpaw.com/
- Already have your API key? Test the API directly in the browser:
  https://playground.hitpaw.com/
- Need help or troubleshooting? Check our FAQ:
  https://developer.hitpaw.com/faq

## Endpoint: POST /api/video-enhancer
Submit a video enhancement task for video super-resolution processing.

### Request body
```json
{
  "video_url": "string",
  "model_name": "string",
  "resolution": [1920, 1080],
  "extension": "string",
  "original_resolution": [1280, 720]
}
```

### Request parameters
| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| video_url | string | Yes | URL of the video to be enhanced |
| model_name | string | Yes | Model name to use for enhancement |
| resolution | array[integer] | Yes | Target resolution as `[width, height]` |
| extension | string | No | File extension. Default is `.mp4`. |
| original_resolution | array[integer] | No | Original video resolution as `[width, height]` |

### Response
```json
{
  "code": 200,
  "message": "OK",
  "data": {
    "job_id": "f5007c0b-e902-4070-8c75-f337d896168f",
    "consume_coins": 75
  }
}
```

### Response fields
| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| job_id | string | Unique identifier for the enhancement job |
| consume_coins | integer | Number of coins consumed for this task |

### Example request: cURL
```bash
curl -X POST https://api-base.hitpaw.com/api/video-enhancer \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Apikey: YOUR_API_KEY" \
  -d '{
    "video_url": "https://example.com/video.mp4",
    "model_name": "video_enhance_v2",
    "resolution": [1920, 1080],
    "extension": ".mp4",
    "original_resolution": [1280, 720]
  }'
```

### Example request: Python
```python
import json
import requests

url = "https://api-base.hitpaw.com/api/video-enhancer"

headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Apikey": "YOUR_API_KEY"
}

payload = {
    "video_url": "https://example.com/video.mp4",
    "model_name": "video_enhance_v2",
    "resolution": [1920, 1080],
    "extension": ".mp4",
    "original_resolution": [1280, 720]
}

response = requests.post(url, headers=headers, data=json.dumps(payload))

if response.status_code == 200:
    result = response.json()
    print(f"Job ID: {result['job_id']}")
    print(f"Consume Coins: {result['consume_coins']}")
else:
    print(f"Error: {response.status_code}")
    print(response.text)
```

## Available models
| Display Name | API `model_name` Value |
|--------------|------------------------|
| Face Soft Model 2x | `face_soft_2x` |
| Portrait Restore Model 1x/2x | `portrait_restore_1x` / `portrait_restore_2x` |
| General Restore Model 1x/2x/4x | `general_restore_1x` / `general_restore_2x` / `general_restore_4x` |
| Ultra HD Model 2x | `ultrahd_restore_2x` |
| Generative Model 1x | `generative_1x` |

## Model specifications
| API `model_name` | Supported Input Formats | Max Input Resolution | Supported Output Formats | Max Output Resolution | Duration |
|------------------|-------------------------|----------------------|--------------------------|----------------------|----------|
| All video models | dv, mlv, m2ts, m2t, m2v, nut, ser, 3g2, 3gp, asf, avi, divx, f4v, flv, h261, h263, m4v, mkv, mov, mp4, mpeg, mpeg4, mpg, mxf, ogv, rm, rmvb, webm, wmv, 3gp2, dmsm, dvdmedia, dvr-ms, trp, vob, vro, gif, xvid | No limit | mp4, mov, mkv, m4v, avi, gif | 36 MP total pixels | 0.5s to 1 hour |

## Endpoint: POST /api/task-status
Query the status of a submitted enhancement job.

### Request body
```json
{
  "job_id": "string"
}
```

### Request parameters
| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| job_id | string | Yes | Job ID returned from photo-enhancer or video-enhancer |

### Response
```json
{
  "code": 200,
  "message": "OK",
  "data": {
    "job_id": "string",
    "status": "string",
    "res_url": "string",
    "original_url": "string"
  }
}
```

### Response fields
| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| job_id | string | Job identifier |
| status | string | Current job status |
| res_url | string | URL of the processed file when status is `COMPLETED` |
| original_url | string | URL of the original input file |

### Status values
| Status | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| CONVERTING | Job is currently being processed |
| COMPLETED | Job completed successfully |
| ERROR | Job failed |

### Example request: cURL
```bash
curl -X POST https://api-base.hitpaw.com/api/task-status \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Apikey: YOUR_API_KEY" \
  -d '{
    "job_id": "abc123def456"
  }'
```

### Example request: Python
```python
import json
import time
import requests

url = "https://api-base.hitpaw.com/api/task-status"

headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Apikey": "YOUR_API_KEY"
}

payload = {
    "job_id": "abc123def456"
}

max_attempts = 60
attempt = 0

while attempt < max_attempts:
    response = requests.post(url, headers=headers, data=json.dumps(payload))

    if response.status_code == 200:
        result = response.json()
        status = result['status']
        print(f"Attempt {attempt + 1}: Status = {status}")

        if status == "COMPLETED":
            print("Job completed successfully!")
            print(f"Result URL: {result['res_url']}")
            print(f"Original URL: {result['original_url']}")
            break
        if status == "ERROR":
            print("Job failed with error")
            break

        time.sleep(5)
        attempt += 1
    else:
        print(f"Error: {response.status_code}")
        print(response.text)
        break
```
